body.title: Layer 3 brick: REPLAN engram
body.result: All 8 Layer 3 TEMPLATE nodes seeded with full tests (1305 passing). Session 2026-04-01h.
body.description: Design and seed REPLAN as a TEMPLATE Memory node. Given delta from OBSERVE, updates decomposition in basket. Re-entrant planning — this is the feedback loop that makes debugging work. Layer 3 cognitive stdlib (D297).
